name: Dandys World Memory
description: Test your recall with the colorful crew from Dandy’s World! This memory game features 15 progressively challenging levels. Start with a small grid and fewer character pairs. As you advance, face more cards, intricate layouts, and a faster pace. Find all matching pairs of Dandy’s iconic characters to clear each level and unlock the next. Perfect your concentration, beat the clock, and prove you’ve got the memory to master Dandys universe!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
